name: pcoc-agent
description: Phase-locked, Calibrated, Open-source Cognitive agent harness for Claude Code and Codex.
novel_features: RIPER-5+C workflow (Calibrate phase between Execute and update-Process)
Skill A/B calibration against golden cases (judge != author)
Multi-layer redaction (credential patterns + entropy + user terms)
inspirations: Self-evolving agents (persistent memory + skill self-evolution loop)
Online advertising systems (pcoc calibration against ground truth)
explicit_non_features: IM bridges (Telegram/Discord/etc.) — out of scope, run Hermes separately if needed
Always-on heartbeat / cron — out of scope, threat model insufficient
Multi-LLM routing within a session — breaks skill calibration assumptions
Cloud memory sync — local-first by design
